sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G D F#m)
Oh heavens, arise, let your voice resound,
The stars in their brilliance, the angels bow down,
A tapestry woven in celestial hues,
All of creation sings praises anew.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A G D F#m)
From the sun in its radiance, the moon in its glow,
To the highest of heavens, where praises overflow,
Mountains and valleys, the seas as they roar,
Lift up your voices, let praise be restored.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (F#m G D A)
For His word has spoken, the cosmos obeys,
In His boundless power, we live all our days.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (D G A Bm)
Hallelujah, let the earth proclaim,
Hallelujah, lift His holy name,
From the depths to the sky, let the anthem rise,
Hallelujah, hallelujah, the song never dies.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A G D F#m)
From the creatures that crawl to the birds in their flight,
All nations and kings, bow in the light,
The old and the young, the strong and the weak,
Together in praise, His glory we seek.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (F#m G A Bm)
Let the mountains echo, let the trees clap their hands,
Let the rivers rejoice, let them dance in the lands,
All creation united in heavenly song,
Forever and ever, His praises belong.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (D G A Bm)
Hallelujah, let the earth proclaim,
Hallelujah, lift His holy name,
From the depths to the sky, let the anthem rise,
Hallelujah, hallelujah, the song never dies.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A G D F#m)
Oh heavens, arise, let your voice resound,
The stars in their brilliance, the angels bow down,
All of creation in harmony sings,
Forever exalted, the King of all kings.
